question: Compare sales by customer Last fiscal year
generated_sql:
SELECT 
    c.customer_name, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now', '-1 year') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_last_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', m.transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', 'now') THEN m.Credit ELSE 0 END) AS sales_current_year
FROM 
    master_txn_table m
JOIN 
    customers c ON m.Customers = c.customer_name
WHERE 
    m.Account IN ('Income', 'Other Income')
GROUP BY 
    c.customer_name
gold_sql: select customers, sum(credit) from master_txn_table where account in ('Income','Other Income') and transaction_date BETWEEN date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months') AND date(current_date, '-3 months', 'start of year','-1 years', '+3 months', '+1 years', '-1 days')  group by customers
mismatch_detail: The intent requires grouping by customer, but the profile topology has group_by: 'none'.

question: How much did Colleen Alexander spend on Accounts Receivable (A/R) in July during last year?
generated_sql:
SELECT SUM(Credit) 
FROM master_txn_table 
JOIN employees ON master_txn_table.businessID = employees.businessID 
WHERE employees.Employee_name = 'Colleen Alexander' 
  AND master_txn_table.Transaction_TYPE = 'A/R' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', master_txn_table.Transaction_DATE) = strftime('%Y-%m', date('now', '-1 year')) || '-07';
gold_sql: select sum(debit) from master_txn_table  as T1 join chart_of_accounts as T2 on T1.account = T2.account_name where T1.customers = "Colleen Alexander" and instr(account,"Accounts Receivable (A/R)") and strftime("%m", transaction_date) = '07' and strftime("%Y", transaction_date) = strftime('%Y', current_date) - 1 and account_type in ('Expense','Other Expense')
mismatch_detail: The profile topology has 'group_by: none' but the intent requires grouping by 'Accountant'.
